key_features: OfflineIndicator widget with compact and detailed modes
file_insights.architecture: ConsumerWidget using Riverpod for state management
file_insights.complexity: Medium - handles multiple offline states and async data loading

file_insights.test_coverage: 40+ tests covering all states and interactions

patterns_discovered: State-based UI rendering using Riverpod providers
Configurable component design with sensible defaults
Color-coded visual feedback using theme-aware colors
Tooltip pattern for detailed status information
Time formatting utility for 'time ago' display
Error boundary handling for async operations
Non-intrusive compact mode vs detailed mode distinction
gotchas_discovered: Complex async handling in _buildLastSyncTime with nested Consumer widget
Error state handling showing empty widget instead of fallback UI
Loading state indicators vary between compact and detailed modes
Integration dependency on offlineStateProvider and cachedDataProvider
Tooltip text generation based on specific OfflineAuthState enum values
Time formatting logic needs to handle various time ranges appropriately
Icon and label customization can break visual consistency if not used carefully

approach_outcome.approach: Comprehensive implementation of offline mode UI system
key_achievements: Created both compact (AppBar) and detailed (standalone) indicator modes
Added last sync time display with 'time ago' formatting
Provided usage examples and integration patterns
approach_outcome.technical_debt: Minimal - clean separation of concerns with good error handling

recommendations: Consider adding unit tests for the time formatting utility method
Document the offline state integration requirements more clearly
Provide a migration guide for existing offline state implementations
Consider adding animation support for state transitions
Evaluate performance impact of nested Consumer widgets in sync time display
Add accessibility attributes for screen reader support
Consider providing default configuration presets for common use cases
